entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop discussed in the context of soil pest damage in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where groundnut production and soil pest issues are analyzed

entities.name: TERMITES
entities.description: Major soil pests belonging to Isoptera: Termidae that are economically important in groundnut production

entities.name: WHITE GRUBS
entities.description: Major soil pests belonging to Coleoptera: Scarabaeidae that are economically important in groundnut production

entities.name: MILLEPEDES
entities.description: Major soil pests belonging to Myriapoda: Odontopygidae that are economically important in groundnut production

entities.name: WIREWORMS
entities.description: Coleopteran soil pests belonging to Elateridae of occasional importance to groundnut

entities.name: FALSE WIREWORMS
entities.description: Coleopteran soil pests belonging to Tenebrionidae of occasional importance to groundnut

entities.name: SOIL PESTS
entities.description: General group of organisms that inhabit the soil and cause damage to groundnut crops

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Farmers' activities such as manure application and planting timing that influence pest occurrence

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An abiotic factor that influences the occurrence and damage caused by soil pests

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURE
entities.description: An abiotic factor that influences the occurrence and damage caused by soil pests

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive approach to pest control combining various strategies

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut varieties to withstand attack by soil pests

entities.name: BOTANICALS
entities.description: Plant-derived substances used as a control measure against soil pests

entities.name: SYNTHETIC INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used for the control of soil pests
